title: Customer Service Copilot
businessProblem: Support teams need faster, more consistent answers across high-volume requests without increasing handling time.
workflow: Grounded assistant retrieves approved service content, drafts answers, and hands sensitive cases to specialists with preserved context.
trustRequirements: Source-backed responses, PII protection, escalation paths, and audit-ready answer traces.
outcome: Lower handle time, more consistent support quality, and safer self-service expansion.

title: Employee Knowledge Assistant
businessProblem: Employees lose time searching fragmented documents, policies, and internal guidance.
workflow: An answer engine unifies search, retrieval, and concise synthesis inside a governed employee workspace.
trustRequirements: Permission-aware retrieval, content freshness, workspace role boundaries, and usage analytics.
outcome: Faster decision-making and stronger reuse of institutional knowledge.

title: Network Operations Assistant
businessProblem: Operations teams need quick, contextual guidance during incidents without introducing unverified recommendations.
workflow: The assistant correlates runbooks, network knowledge, and topology context to suggest safe next actions.
trustRequirements: Strict source provenance, operator review, environment awareness, and incident logging.
outcome: Better operator productivity with fewer unsafe or inconsistent incident responses.

title: Regulated Enterprise AI Workspace
businessProblem: Knowledge workers in regulated sectors need AI acceleration without sacrificing reviewability or compliance.
workflow: Role-aware copilots guide drafting, summarization, and workflow execution inside approved process boundaries.
trustRequirements: Human approval, audit logs, residency controls, and policy-aware document access.
outcome: Measured productivity gains with evidence strong enough for risk and compliance stakeholders.
